content: The Self-Refine framework’s iterative unguided refinement pipeline can be upgraded by integrating multiple inconsistent perspective sampling from LLM self-reflection mechanisms, creating a new self-improving LLM system that retains the original’s zero-training, no-external-resource advantage while fixing the common blind-spot problem of single-perspective self-feedback. This hybrid system would allow LLMs to both catch logical gaps and improve output quality without any additional human supervision or fine-tuning.
